title: iOS App Icon Dark
label: Dark Liquid Glass
summary: Primary dark icon with a deep navy/graphite background and translucent W ribbon mark.
prompt: Wakeve iOS app icon dark. No text. Deep midnight navy and warm charcoal gradient background, centered abstract W made from three thick rounded translucent glass ribbons, Liquid Glass edge reflections, subtle internal glow, warm peach halo, readable at small sizes.

title: iOS App Icon Light
label: Light Liquid Glass
summary: Light appearance with pearl/mist background and a warmer blue-lavender-peach ribbon mark.
prompt: Wakeve iOS app icon light. No text. Soft pearl and mist blue gradient background, abstract W from three rounded translucent ribbons, muted blue, soft lavender, warm peach accent, simple silhouette, no calendar or checklist cues.

title: iOS Tinted Dark
label: Tinted Dark
summary: Higher-contrast dark tinted export for the iOS icon catalog.
prompt: Wakeve tinted dark iOS icon. No text. Dark graphite/navy background, stronger pearl/lavender/blue foreground glass W, simplified contrast for tinted icon rendering.

title: iOS Tinted Light
label: Tinted Light
summary: Light tinted export with a pale pearl field and blue-lavender glass symbol.
prompt: Wakeve tinted light iOS icon. No text. Pale pearl background, soft blue-lavender tint through the glass W, clean thick rounded ribbons, no hard outlines or saturated purple.
